purpose: Make the current SQL/JPA knowledge layer inspectable so agents can use local facts before asking an LLM/provider.

topic_matrix.notes: Keeps runtime capability claims separate from dialect language facts.
Classifies core read/write statements and CoQuery support boundaries.
Provides table/source introspection templates or JPA source-command guidance.
Separates SQL LIMIT/OFFSET templates from JPQL API-level pagination.
Captures driver/API placeholder conventions for basic generated examples.
Covers common scalar mappings; not yet a complete DDL or conversion matrix.
Covers common comparison, logical, pattern, null, and membership operators.
Provides basic SQL joins and JPQL relationship/fetch join patterns.
Covers common database constraints and first JPA mapping annotations.
Documents dialect templates and marks unsupported CoQuery execution paths.
Defines read-only default, explicit write gate, and risky UPDATE/DELETE warnings.

can_answer_locally: which SQL/JPA capability claims are safe
which common statements are reads or writes
basic schema introspection templates by supported/planned dialect
common operator, join, constraint, and upsert patterns
JPQL vs SQL naming and runtime boundaries
still_needs_llm_or_external_docs: vendor-specific function coverage beyond the seed topics

remaining_gaps.description: SQL generation and natural routing do not yet consult local knowledge before provider calls.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add a planner/validator that retrieves db_knowledge by dialect and topic before generation.

remaining_gaps.description: Schema knowledge has table/source templates but no normalized cross-backend column, index, foreign-key, and constraint model.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add a schema-detail command and fixtures for SQLite plus PostgreSQL.

remaining_gaps.description: Date/time, string, aggregate, JSON, and null-handling function differences are not yet structured.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add source-linked function rules per dialect.

remaining_gaps.description: Transaction, isolation, locking, and dry-run behavior are not yet represented.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add transaction safety rules before broadening write workflows.

remaining_gaps.description: JPQL knowledge covers boundaries and common patterns but does not generate or execute JPQL.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add a Java/JPA runner proof before claiming JPQL execution support.

remaining_gaps.description: Official source refresh cadence is documented informally, not enforced by tooling.
remaining_gaps.next_step: Add a source-audit checklist or metadata gate for knowledge changes.

next_gate.name: local_knowledge_first_generation
next_gate.pass_condition: Generation, natural, and write planning paths consult local DB knowledge for dialect, safety, and schema decisions before any provider call.
next_gate.verification: Add tests proving a local rule can answer a request and that provider invocation is skipped for that covered topic.
